---
title: "04 Drug-Ingredient-Target Network Construction"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading 
library(tidyverse)

# Global Parameters 
top_ratio <- 0.1 # Top 10% topological nodes

# Data Import 
# Import drug target and disease target datasets

# Data Analysis 
# 1. Match drug, ingredient and target relationships
# 2. Generate standard input files for Cytoscape
# 3. Calculate topological parameters and screen core nodes

# Result Export 
# Output network node and edge files for visualization

# Result Description 
# Illustrate network construction rules and topological screening standards
